title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Mandatory Disclosure Rules – Reportable Transactions
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Mandatory Disclosure Rules – Reportable Transactions
Join us for an interactive discussion of Canada’s expanded reportable transaction rules that have been enacted as part of the new suite of mandatory disclosure rules.
Following a brief overview of the final version of the rules, we will engage in a practical discussion that considers the application of the rules in commonly encountered scenarios such as financings, acquisitions and other transactions. We will also discuss strategies for dealing with the new rules.
- Fred Purkey , Partner, National Tax Group, Montréal
- Etienne Laplante , Associate, National Tax Group, Montréal
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
Mandatory continuing education for Quebec CPAs: This program is equivalent to 1.5 hours of content. You can find more information on the continuing education requirements for Quebec CPAs here .
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
Note: This will take place in our Montréal office and the seminar will be offered in English only . A lunch to suit most dietary concerns will be served.
11:30 a.m. Registration & lunch
12:00 p.m. Session starts
1:30 p.m. Session ends
- Fred Purkey Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
